title: SQL/XML: implementation of and test for xmlcomment() broken?
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Customers (CustId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(100), Balance DECIMAL(10, 2), CreatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO Customers (CustId, Name, Balance) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', 1000.00);
INSERT INTO Customers (CustId, Name, Balance) VALUES (2, 'Jane Smith', NULL);
SELECT 'Customer' AS Name, CustId AS id, Name AS name, 'Customer record for ' || COALESCE(Name, 'Unknown') AS Comment FROM Customers;
SELECT 'Customer' AS Name, CustId AS id, 'Balance is ' || COALESCE(CAST(Balance AS VARCHAR), 'not available') AS Comment FROM Customers WHERE Balance IS NOT NULL;
